[[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] '''Prescott''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Death Star Trooper/Legends|Death Star trooper]] who served in the detention block guard serving on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], he volunteered for his [[Prison/Legends|prison]] detail position, as he took sadistic pleasure in seeing Imperial justice enforced.

He was present when [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] rescued [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] from her prison cell. Prescott was the third casualty of the battle. After [[Shann Childsen/Legends|Shann Childsen]] and [[Devin Cant]] were killed, Prescott returned fire and charged against Han Solo, but was subsequently shot in the abdomen and killed by Luke Skywalker.
